title: Specify version verbatim in setup.cfg
body:
This restores compatibility with older setuptools versions.

NB, the version needs to be kept in sync between setup.cfg and version.py.

Relates: https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/244

Is there a way to test if they are out of sync?

> Is there a way to test if they are out of sync?

You can use a tool like [bump2version](https://pypi.org/project/bump2version/) to easily bump versions in both places if you'd like.
I don't care how it is done. I just want to make sure we prevent human mistakes.
It's hard for me to make suggestions, as I don't know what the release process for this project looks like.

> It's hard for me to make suggestions, as I don't know what the release process for this project looks like.

@umohnani8 we'll need to create a RELEASE_PROCESS.md as in podman and I guess we should be ok to include bump2version as part of the process.
for whatever reason, mergebot isn't working. Merging manually..
